title: lithospermum affine
intro: Lithospermum affine, also known as Chinese gromwell, is a flowering plant species native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lithospermum affine include its ability to help reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Lithospermum affine can be found in tea, tincture, and capsule forms, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
